lead.title: Trump admin announces expansion of visa restriction policy in Western Hemisphere
lead.summary: The State Department said it imposed visa restrictions on 26 individuals under the expanded policy targeting those acting for U.S. adversaries.

sources.name: BBC

items.title: Finance ministers and top bankers raise serious concerns about Mythos AI model
items.summary: Experts say Mythos potentially has an unprecedented ability to identify and exploit cybersecurity weaknesses.

items.title: Rising value of Pokémon cards sparks smash and grab crime spree
items.summary: Small shops across the UK are being targeted by thieves stealing collectibles worth thousands of pounds.

items.title: Netflix co-founder Reed Hastings to step down as chairman
items.summary: Hastings set up the company in 1997, when it rented DVDs to customers and delivered by post.

items.title: No issues with UK fuel supply, says Reeves
items.summary: The chancellor was speaking at the end of the International Monetary Fund meeting in Washington.

items.title: Europe has 'maybe six weeks of jet fuel left', energy boss warns
items.summary: Flights could soon be cancelled if supplies from the Gulf remain blocked, says the International Energy Agency.

items.summary: The State Department said it imposed visa restrictions on 26 individuals under the expanded policy targeting those acting for U.S. adversaries.

items.title: Singer D4vd arrested and held without bail in case tied to teen found dead in Tesla: Police
items.summary: Singer D4vd, whose real name is David Burke, was arrested in connection with the murder of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez in LA, LAPD says.

items.title: EXCLUSIVE: NYC officials refuse ICE hold for illegal alien accused in arson that killed 4 and injured 7: DHS
items.summary: A Mexican national illegal alien accused of randomly setting a NYC apartment on fire that killed four could be released due to the city's sanctuary policies, DHS sa…

items.title: Former SMU cornerback Teddy Knox faces $2.88M judgment for crash linked to Rashee Rice's Lamborghini race
items.summary: Teddy Knox, who was racing Rashee Rice's Lamborghini in a 2024 Dallas crash, was ordered to pay $2.88 million in a default judgment lawsuit.

items.title: Miami Catholic Charities loses $11M contract providing care for migrant children under Trump administration
items.summary: The Trump administration canceled an $11 million Catholic Charities contract in Miami, citing a drop in illegal immigration and fewer unaccompanied minors.

sources.note: Fox News headlines via official RSS. Fox terms require attribution and direct links to full articles.
